data.title: AXIOS: Senior US official says no threats received from Iran to attack ships
data.description: According to AXIOS: Senior U.S. officials stated that they have not received any threats from Iran to attack the ships. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Officials Report No Threats from Iran on Vessel Attacks
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. senior officials have stated that there have been no threats received regarding Iranian attacks on vessels. This information was reported by AXIOS.

data.title: Israeli Military Strikes Over 200 Hezbollah Targets in Lebanon
data.description:
The Israeli Defense Forces announced on April 11 that they have conducted airstrikes on more than 200 targets in Lebanon over the past day. According to BlockBeats, all targets were associated with the Iran-backed terrorist organization Hezbollah. Video footage released shows a building exploding after an aerial attack, while another video captures a similar scene from a distance. The Israeli Defense Forces did not provide further details regarding these videos.

The military stated that its air force continues to target infrastructure linked to Hezbollah. Additionally, the forces are assisting ground troops in southern Lebanon to combat launch sites and prevent artillery fire aimed at Israeli citizens.

data.title: Hermes Agent Integrates Native Support for Personal WeChat Use
data.description: Hermes Agent now offers native support for personal WeChat accounts, allowing users to connect easily via QR code for use in private and group chats. According to Foresight News, the adapter utilizes Tencent's official iLink Bot API, enabling comprehensive coverage of images, videos, files, and voice messages, ensuring convenient long-polling direct connections without the need for a public IP. Users can experience this by running 'hermes update'. The adapter employs Tencent's official iLink Bot API rather than reverse engineering protocols or unofficial clients. For users concerned about account bans, it is recommended to test using secondary accounts.

data.title: Grayscale Reduces Q2 Asset List, Expands AI Sector
data.description: Grayscale has revised its list of assets under consideration for the second quarter, reducing it from 36 to 30. According to NS3.AI, the company has expanded its focus on the AI sector, increasing the number of projects in this area to 10. Meanwhile, assets such as Aptos, Arbitrum, BNB, and Polkadot have been removed from the list.

data.title: A whale sold 64.7 WBTC after holding the position for 15 hours, incurring a loss of $12,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale bought $4.7 million worth of WBTC at a cost of $72,720.78. After holding the position for 15 hours, the whale sold off 64.7 WBTC at a price of $72,536, incurring a loss of $12,000.

data.title: Iran and U.S. Enter Working-Level Expert Consultations in Negotiations
data.description: Iran and the United States have transitioned their negotiations to a working-level expert consultation phase, as reported by an Iranian source. According to NS3.AI, members of the Iranian delegation's expert committee have traveled to the venue to participate in the discussions.

data.title: Bitcoin Leads Social Dominance While Ethereum Tops AI Search Rankings
data.description: Bitcoin has emerged as the leader in social dominance with a ranking of 32.7%. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum has taken the lead in AI search rankings, securing an 11% share. These rankings highlight the ongoing interest and engagement in the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin and Ethereum maintaining significant influence in their respective areas.

data.title: Major WBTC Investor Exits Position After 15 Hours with $12,000 Loss
data.description: An analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that a significant investor, identified by the wallet address 0x0EA225f92408532403FbFE5357d5d94676F34a54, exited their position in Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) just 15 hours after entering. The investor initially purchased WBTC at a cost of $72,720.78, investing a total of $4.7 million. However, four hours ago, they sold 64.7 WBTC at $72,536, incurring a loss of $12,000.

data.title: Bitcoin Analyst Predicts Potential Downturn Before Establishing True Bottom
data.description: Bitcoin analyst Killa has noted that in previous Bitcoin cycles, each concluded with a final decline marked by a capitulation bottom. According to Odaily, the peak in the current cycle occurred earlier than in past cycles. If history repeats itself, Bitcoin may experience another downturn before establishing a true bottom.

data.title: Analyst Killa: If history repeats itself, BTC may experience another drop before establishing a true bottom.
data.description: BTC analyst Killa wrote that, comparing all previous Bitcoin cycles, each cycle includes a final decline ending in a capitulation bottom. This week, the peak occurred earlier than in previous cycles. If history repeats itself, BTC may experience another decline before a true bottom is established.

data.title: Iran says the US has agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon.
data.description: On the 11th local time, it was learned from Iranian sources that the United States agreed to unfreeze Iranian assets and agree to a ceasefire in Lebanon. The United States has not yet released any related information. (CCTV News)

data.title: A senior Iranian military official denied reports of any US ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: According to Iranian state television, a senior Iranian military official denied reports that any US ships had transited the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S.–Iran Discussions Begin as Vice President Vance Leads Talks in Islamabad
data.description:
Key Takeaways
JD Vance is leading high-stakes talks with Iran in Islamabad.Negotiations aim to stabilize the ceasefire and end the conflict.Talks are indirect and mediated by Pakistan amid deep mistrust.Key issues include Strait of Hormuz, sanctions, and nuclear program.
Talks Officially Underway
Discussions involving the United States and Iran have officially begun in Islamabad, with JD Vance heading the US delegation.
The negotiations are part of a broader effort to extend a fragile ceasefire and potentially move toward a longer-term resolution of the conflict.
Pakistan Acting as Mediator
The talks are being hosted and mediated by Pakistan, which has played a central role in facilitating communication between both sides.
Meetings are taking place under tight security conditionsDelegations are engaging through indirect channels, though direct talks may occurPakistani officials are coordinating between both sides to push toward progress 
High-Stakes Agenda
Key topics under discussion include:
Reopening the Strait of Hormuz (critical for global oil supply)Potential sanctions relief for IranLimits on Iran’s nuclear programBroader regional stability and ceasefire enforcement 
Tensions and Mistrust Remain High
Despite the start of talks, major disagreements persist:
Iran has set conditions, including halting certain military actionsThe US has maintained a firm stance and warned against delaysBoth sides remain cautious, reflecting deep geopolitical mistrust

data.title: Iran Warns U.S. Destroyer Near Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Iran has reported the movement of a U.S. destroyer from the UAE's Fujairah Port towards the Strait of Hormuz on the 11th. According to Odaily, the Iranian armed forces closely monitored the vessel's movements and promptly informed the Iranian delegation engaged in talks in Pakistan. The delegation, through a Pakistani mediator, conveyed Iran's position to the U.S., issuing a clear warning to the destroyer: if it continued to approach the Strait of Hormuz, it would face an attack within 30 minutes, and ongoing negotiations would be affected. Following Iran's firm response and the timely warning from the negotiation team, the U.S. ordered the destroyer to halt its advance and turn back.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Faster AI Progress May Impact U.S. Labor Force Participation by 2050
data.description: A recent study conducted by multiple universities suggests that accelerated advancements in artificial intelligence could significantly affect U.S. labor force participation. According to NS3.AI, the research predicts a decline from 62% to 54% by 2050 under a rapid AI development scenario. This scenario also anticipates an annual GDP growth rate of 3.5% between 2045 and 2049. The focus of the debate has shifted to whether AI will generate sufficient new employment opportunities to counterbalance the displacement of existing jobs.

data.title: Middle East Conflict and Rising Oil Prices Impact Crypto Market
data.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East and increasing crude oil prices are influencing the cryptocurrency market through interest-rate and risk channels. According to NS3.AI, these developments are contributing to bear market pressures. Additionally, Hong Kong's stablecoin licensing, disputes over prediction market rules, and Hyperliquid's crude oil trading are emerging as significant themes in the current market landscape.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Addresses Fertilizer Prices Amid Iran's Freedom Struggle
data.description:
On April 11, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his concerns on the Truth platform regarding fertilizer prices in the context of Iran's fight for freedom. According to BlockBeats, Trump emphasized that the United States will not tolerate price gouging by fertilizer monopolies. He assured American farmers of his support in this matter.

Agricultural fertilizers are among the key products imported by the United States through the Hormuz Strait.

data.title: US destroyer turns back from Strait of Hormuz after warning from Iran
data.description: On the 11th local time, Iran stated that it had detected a US destroyer sailing from the port of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates towards the Strait of Hormuz. After closely monitoring its movements, the Iranian armed forces immediately notified the Iranian delegation negotiating in Pakistan. The delegation then conveyed its position to the US through Pakistani mediators and issued a clear warning to the destroyer: if it continued to approach the Strait of Hormuz, it would be attacked within 30 minutes, and the negotiations would be affected. Due to the resolute response of the Iranian armed forces and the timely warning from the negotiating team, the US ultimately ordered the destroyer to halt and turn back. (CCTV News)

data.title: A journalist from Iranian state television confirmed that the United States has agreed to unfreeze Iranian funds.
data.description: A correspondent for Iranian state television in Islamabad confirmed that the United States has agreed to unfreeze Iranian funds. (Jinshi)
